text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When the sun peeks out from the<n>clouds, Ryan
and Dober pop into my<n>head.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You see, a little while ago, when there<n>was a
sudden shower of rain, I went to<n>give them an
umbrella...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Lest I slip and fall, I walked extra<n>carefully, and
by the time I arrived the<n>rain had stopped.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Even so, the two of them insisted on<n>using the
umbrella in the sun, so as not<n>to let my efforts go
to waste. Hehe, it's a<n>very heartwarming memory.
